purpose: Continuation roadmap for deeper longform selection, reframing, source media review, visual verification, and quality governance artifacts.

artifacts.purpose: Store model-selected source transcript text and deterministic matches back to word timestamps.
Persist approved candidate sets, manual ordering, collection reason, and render readiness.
Map diarized speakers to face tracks with confidence and optional user confirmation.
Store frame-level or segment-level crop targets for face, screen, cursor, object, and motion tracking.
Record inspected media content, frame samples, risks, usable-for notes, and planning implications.
Record sampled frames and reasons for source review, crop review, visual match, and final review.
Verify subject, action, style, caption-lane, and safe-zone match between scene intent and selected visual assets.
Aggregate render validation, script score, caption sync, crop review, source review, asset ledger, visual match, decisions, and cost into one go/no-go report.
Record provider options, selected provider, score dimensions, reason, and fallback.
Track estimated, reserved, actual, failed, and refunded spend per production operation.
Turn research-pack blueprints, recipes, repo cards, and quality gates into executable parity fixtures.

gates: LLM-selected clips must match back to source words before timestamps are trusted.
Non-portrait source footage must have a crop mode and target subject before render.
User media must be inspected before planning claims what it contains.
Visual assets must pass scene-intent and safe-zone checks before render.
Publish review must produce a pass/revise/fail status and a concrete rerun action.
